intent_summary: Build Field Monitor Snap-On Tool Phase 2 Spoke Deployment. Deploy three Cloudflare Workers: Fetcher (field-monitor-fetcher), Parser Registry (field-monitor-parser-registry), Proxy Router (field-monitor-proxy-router). All three are pure functions — no state, no Neon writes. Implement per Doc2 specs. Run contract tests against each deployed Worker to verify response shapes match locked interface contracts. Fetcher: plain+proxied fetch_mode, AbortController timeout, UTF-8 transcode, byte_limit. Parser Registry: KV lookup by domain::field_name, execute stored parser, FIELD_ABSENT vs EXTRACTION_FAILED distinction. Proxy Router: read rate_state from Neon, sliding window rate check, KV egress path lookup, compute rate_delta. Deploy via wrangler.
phase_label: Spoke Deployment — Fetcher + Parser Registry + Proxy Router
go_condition: All three Workers deployed. Contract tests pass for each: correct response shapes, Parser returns extracted_value + confidence_score, Proxy returns egress_path + rate_state_snapshot + rate_delta.

agent_routing.builder: Implement and deploy all three spoke Workers in parallel. Fetcher, Parser Registry, Proxy Router per Doc2 specs.
agent_routing.auditor: Contract test each deployed Worker sequentially. Flag any response field missing or mistyped.

snap_on_toolbox_compliance.banned_check: beautifulsoup4 BANNED, requests BANNED, lxml BANNED

parallelization_note: Fetcher, Parser Registry, Proxy Router have no interdependency — Builder may deploy in parallel.
constraints: Do not expand scope beyond three spoke Workers
Proxy Router does NOT write to Neon — read only
Service Bindings not wired in this phase — that is Phase 3
Parser function stored in KV as serialized fn_body string
